tech_news.title: Shark’s versatile ChillPill cooling system is back to its best price - The Verge
tech_news.description: Shark’s ChillPill Personal Fan and Cooling System is $99.99 ($30 off). The versatile cooling gadget combines a ten-speed fan and dry-touch evaporative mister.

tech_news.title: Man with staggering $20 billion net worth put a car order in so big that Mercedes had to shut down its factory - supercarblondie.com
tech_news.description: The 'Rainbow Sheikh' has a staggering $20 billion net worth and once put in a car order that was so big, it shut down manufacturing at a Mercedes factory

tech_news.title: Apple and Google ordered to purge ‘nudify’ apps from App Stores - TechCrunch
tech_news.description: In letters sent to Apple and Google, San Francisco City Attorney David Chiu said that both companies have long been aware that they are hosting apps in violation of state law.

tech_news.title: Pebble founder Eric Migicovsky says his 30-day warranty is all about trust - The Verge
tech_news.description: Pebble founder Eric Migicovsky talks about reports of issues on its new e-paper smartwatches, and the short 30-day warranty they carry.

tech_news.title: Apple Music Hikes Subscription Prices, Citing Rising Licensing Fees - Variety
tech_news.description: Apple is hiking the prices of Apple Music subscription plans -- the tech giant's first rate increases for the service since the fall of 2022, citing higher music licensing costs.
